purpose: Top-level overview of the Synapse SSE server: zero-dependency Node http server, modular structure (index/SSEManager/routes/services/utils), startup/shutdown sequence, CORS handling, request logging, and the file-watcher → SSE → browser real-time data pipeline. Explains key design decisions (zero deps, SSE over WebSockets, file-based state, hybrid watching).
gotchas: Zero npm dependencies by design — only built-in modules
SIGINT/SIGTERM handlers must run cleanly to release watchers
Hybrid watching strategy needed because fs.watch alone misses events on some platforms
conventions: PORT env var only external configuration
